ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: Core login controls were identified correctly, but the draft contains duplicate password elements, noisy layout content, weak semantic naming, and missing validation/navigation elements required for reliable downstream automation.

issues.message: Two separate password elements represent the same functional control, creating ambiguity for downstream keyword and resource generation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the actual interactive password textbox using locator id=ion-input-1 and remove the duplicate ion-input wrapper element.

issues.message: Element name 'password' is too generic and does not follow the semantic naming style used elsewhere in the framework.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to password_textbox for consistency and readability.

issues.message: The ion-input wrapper with locator id=password is classified as a textbox even though it behaves as a component container around the real native input.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the wrapper element from approved elements and retain the native interactive input control only.

issues.message: Background content container is decorative layout structure and not useful for business automation or validation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model.

issues.message: Back button required by workflow navigation and validation expectations is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a back_button element using locator id=auto_back_btn.

issues.message: Home button required for unauthenticated return-path validation is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a home_button element using locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires observable generic Failed authentication validation, but no authentication error/message element is present in the approved page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a generic_failed_authentication_message element using a stable locator targeting the visible Failed authentication message.

issues.message: Password masking behavior is a key workflow validation requirement but no dedicated verification-support element or metadata is represented.
issues.suggested_fix: Retain the password_textbox with type=password metadata and document that it supports masking validation.

issues.message: The locator relies on visible text only and may become brittle if button labeling changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable id, data-testid, or semantic attribute if available in the DOM; otherwise retain the current locator as fallback.

approved_elements.name: user_name_textbox
approved_elements.description: Username input field used for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field with masked character entry behavior.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Returns the user to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigates back to the Home page while remaining unauthenticated.

approved_elements.name: generic_failed_authentication_message
approved_elements.description: Displays the generic authentication failure message for invalid or rejected login attempts.
